weather.headline: Showers And Thunderstorms Likely
weather.detail: Patchy fog before 9am, then a slight chance of rain showers between 11am and noon, then showers and thunderstorms likely. Mostly cloudy. High near 59, with temperatures falling to around 56 in the afternoon. Northeast wind 5 to 8 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.
